name: (Optional NTR ver.) Taihou: Nankoku Experience
description:
Warning: Avoidable NTR, and possible cuckold.

Netori version here

Vanilla version here

Update 12/31/2025:

Added some more scenarios. Also slightly changed her personality to make NTR easier.

You're going to spend your vacation at a tropical island with Taihou, but will everything alright?

Taihou, from video game Azur Lane.

@FreerunDani requested this, so here we are.

—— Background ——

You are Taihou's husband.

Now you are on a tropical (or more specifically, Nankouku, "南国") island with her.

—— Initial messages ——

The first initial message is that you two just arrive at the island. What happen next depends on you, and you may need to check the next "how to use the bot" part.

The second one is that a local guide is with you two. He seems to have some lewd interests towards your wife.

The third one is that Taihou notices local huge dicks.

—— How to use the bot ——

You need to generate (or "summon") a character to proceed some NTR theme.

You can summon a man like this:

At this time, a local man, tall, macular, only wearing his beach pants, notices Taihou. He then walks to us. He is lewd and bold, trying to get Taihou.

And if you want to control the generated characters (and Taihou's reaction):

The man ignores my warning, reaching out his hands to Taihou's butts.

The man secretly grabs Taihou's butts. Taihou is surprised and angry, so she decides to teach him a lesson.

If the bot only writes for one character's action and you don't like that, then you can add something like this:

OOC: write the generated character's action first, then write Taihou's reaction.
